metadata.description: Curated plugins for AI-assisted work: UI/UX excellence, session management, and more.

plugins.name: ui-excellence
plugins.description: Comprehensive UI/UX skills for web interfaces — 12 skills spanning visual design, typography, accessibility, usability audits, conversion optimization, microinteractions, and engagement loops.

plugins.name: smart-session-rename-cc
plugins.description: Auto-name your Claude Code sessions. A Stop hook watches your conversation, scores work-density deterministically, and asks Haiku for a `domain: clauses` title when meaningful work has accumulated. Seven /smart-rename subcommands give you manual override, anchoring, freeze/force, and inspection.

plugins.name: prompt-master
plugins.description: Generates optimized prompts for any AI tool (LLMs, image/video AI, coding agents). Vendored from nidhinjs/prompt-master via git subtree, kept in sync via weekly GitHub Action.
